profile.name: Likhith Satya Neerukonda
profile.availability: Open to full-time AI/ML and full-stack roles
profile.summary: Computer science graduate student at the University of North Texas, building practical AI systems across computer vision, NLP, automated data pipelines, and production-ready web interfaces.
highlights: 98% detection accuracy with YOLOv8 + ResNet on AWS SageMaker
40% faster image processing through automated ML pipelines
20% increase in user satisfaction through BERT-based sentiment analysis

experience.summary: Supported academic operations while developing automation scripts for document workflows and feedback processing.
bullets: Created Python scripts that automated form validation and applied NLP techniques to summarize feedback.
Reduced manual document processing effort and improved consistency across academic documentation workflows.
Improved scheduling and resource coordination through Outlook, Slack, and shared Google Sheets workflows.

experience.summary: Built AI-powered product features, computer vision pipelines, NLP tools, and full-stack platform improvements.
bullets: Implemented YOLOv8 and ResNet models on AWS SageMaker for real-time image automation, achieving 98% detection accuracy.
Built end-to-end Python pipelines using pandas and scikit-learn on AWS S3 to preprocess image data and generate labeled datasets.
Integrated BERT-based NLP models with Streamlit for sentiment analysis and text classification, strengthening product feedback loops.
Developed full-stack features for the Tenmates platform and collaborated in Agile sprints through code reviews and technical discussions.

experience.summary: Researched MANET QoS performance using simulations, containerized experiments, and ML-assisted analysis.
bullets: Evaluated QoS performance using NS-3 routing simulations in Docker and PyTorch-based analysis workflows.
Analyzed routing behavior, mobility effects, packet flow, latency, throughput, and network stability.
Reviewed 30+ studies and documented results in LaTeX reports for peer review and future research direction.

experience.summary: Developed prototype automation tools and research documentation to optimize recruitment workflows.
bullets: Built automation tools to streamline recruitment workflows and reduce repetitive manual tasks.
Developed prototype software in Flask and PyTorch with technical documentation and experiment protocols.
Tracked project milestones through Git and weekly status reports to maintain consistent delivery.

projects.name: IntelliFace AI Attendance System
projects.description: A face-recognition attendance system using YOLOv8 and ResNet encodings, with real-time webcam detection, automated attendance logging, user verification, and operational dashboards.
details: Designed a real-time detection workflow for identifying users from webcam input.
Built Streamlit and Flask interfaces for attendance management and system control.
Automated attendance logging to reduce manual tracking overhead.

projects.name: Smart Curb Parking System
projects.description: An automated parking enforcement system using YOLOv7 and ILPD-NET, with live camera feed integration, edge detection, Gaussian filtering, and real-time preprocessing pipelines.
details: Integrated live camera feeds for real-time inference in street-scene environments.
Applied edge detection and Gaussian filtering to improve preprocessing quality.
Structured a detection pipeline for automated parking enforcement workflows.
